output.summary: Remove font-bold from TextCard title classes in both TSX and PHP. The typography tokens text-header-1 and text-header-3 already define font-weight: 400 via CSS custom properties, but font-bold (weight 700) overrides them. Removing font-bold allows the correct 400 weight to apply.

fileChanges.details: Change 'font-bold mb-4 break-words relative z-1' to 'mb-4 break-words relative z-1' on line 88

fileChanges.description: Remove font-bold from title class_name array
fileChanges.details: Change 'font-bold mb-4 break-words relative z-1' to 'mb-4 break-words relative z-1' on line 47

designDecisions.decision: Remove font-bold to allow typography tokens to control font weight at 400
designDecisions.evidence: User explicitly requested font-weight 400 for card titles. Typography tokens text-header-1 and text-header-3 already define --font-weight: 400 in resources/css/screen/typography.css (lines 23, 27), so removing the font-bold override is sufficient.
